extract: Diglett (Japanese: ディグダ Digda) is a Ground-type Pokémon introduced in Generation I. It evolves into Dugtrio starting at level 26. In Alola, Diglett has a dual-type Ground/Steel regional form. It evolves into Alolan Dugtrio starting at level 26. It bears a close resemblance to Wiglett; however, the two are separate species.
